response.body:
{
    "message": "Thread posts retrieved successfully",
    "thread": {
        "threadId": 1,
        "threadTitle": "Help with Genetics Concepts",
        "forumId": 1,
        "courseCode": "BIOL3907"
    },
    "posts": [
        {
            "postId": 1,
            "threadId": 1,
            "userId": 100000001,
            "fullName": "Allison Hill",
            "parentPostId": null,
            "content": "I'm struggling to understand dominant vs recessive traits. Can someone explain?",
            "createdAt": "Thu, 30 Apr 2026 16:38:30 GMT"
        },
        {
            "postId": 2,
            "threadId": 1,
            "userId": 100000001,
            "fullName": "Allison Hill",
            "parentPostId": null,
            "content": "Dominant traits show even if only one allele is present.",
            "createdAt": "Thu, 30 Apr 2026 17:03:10 GMT"
        },
        {
            "postId": 3,
            "threadId": 1,
            "userId": 100000001,
            "fullName": "Allison Hill",
            "parentPostId": 2,
            "content": "So does that mean recessive needs two alleles?",
            "createdAt": "Thu, 30 Apr 2026 17:07:13 GMT"
        }
    ]
}
